---
name: Bug Report
about: Report audio processing issues, UI bugs, or pipeline failures
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Pipeline Stage (if known)**
Stage number and pass (e.g., Stage 14 / SPECTRAL pass)

**Expected behavior**
What should happen

**Actual behavior**
What actually happened (include audio artifacts description: clicks, silence, echo, phase issues)

**Audio source**
Format, duration, sample rate, channel count

**Browser / Platform**
Browser version, OS, GPU (for WebGPU issues)

**Mode**
- [ ] Live
- [ ] Creator/Offline
- [ ] Forensic

**Console errors**
Paste any relevant console output
